jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Abbott India
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
